item.title: 美国将释放1.72亿桶石油以响应国际能源署动用储备计划
item.description: 特朗普政府计划从美国战略石油储备中释放1.72亿桶原油，作为各国协调行动的一部分，以缓解伊朗战争期间飙升的原油和汽油价格。【原文：The Trump administration plans to release 172 million barrels from the US emergency oil reserve as part of the coordinated effort by nations around the world to ease surging crude and gasoline prices amid the Iran war.】

item.title: 亚洲股市将下跌，油价因战争焦点而攀升：市场综述
item.description: 亚洲股市周四开盘料将走低，延续本周以来震荡交投态势。此前富裕国家协同释放储备的举措未能遏制油价上涨势头。美国国债价格下跌，显示通胀担忧依然存在。【原文：Asian stocks looked set to open lower on Thursday, extending a week of volatile trading after a coordinated move by rich nations to release reserves did little to stem a rally in oil prices. Treasuries fell in a sign inflation concerns remain live.】

item.title: 摩根大通称对冲基金遭遇4月以来最严重亏损
item.description: 摩根大通策略师指出，对冲基金正遭遇解放日关税风波以来最严重的回撤，拥挤交易的平仓操作正重创快钱群体。【原文：Hedge funds are experiencing the biggest drawdown since the Liberation Day tariff turmoil, as unwinds in crowded trades punish the fast-money cohort, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co. strategists.】

item.title: 私人信贷的赎回压力过山车
item.description:
本期《大局观》播客聚焦：从破产潮到人工智能投资风险，再到新兴投资者的压力，私募信贷领域近期动荡的深层原因。

【原文：

Today on the Big Take podcast: from bankruptcies to the risks of investing in AI and new investor pressure, the recent tumult in the world of private credit.

】

item.title: 摩根士丹利限制私募信贷基金赎回
item.description: 摩根士丹利限制了其一只私募信贷基金的赎回，仅返还了投资者申请赎回资金的一半以下。【原文：Morgan Stanley capped redemptions from one of its private credit funds, returning less than half of the capital that investors sought to cash out.】

item.title: 金价小幅走低，因交易员权衡降息预期减弱
item.description: 随着中东战争持续，美国月度通胀数据公布后，市场对美联储降息的预期减弱，金价应声回落。【原文：Gold slipped after the release of monthly US inflation data dimmed prospects for the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates as the war in the Middle East drags on.】

item.title: 你对经济衰退的认知可能完全错误
item.description:
埃克森美孚首席经济学家泰勒·古德斯皮德做客《特朗普经济学》节目，阐释为何需要经历大量经济破坏才能使一个国家陷入衰退。

【原文：

ExxonMobil Chief Economist Tyler Goodspeed joins Trumponomics to explain why it takes a lot of economic ruin to tip a country into a downturn.

】

item.title: Atlassian首席执行官宣布裁员1600人的计划时，将此归因于人工智能转型
item.description: Atlassian公司首席执行官迈克·坎农-布鲁克斯宣布计划裁员约1600人，称向人工智能的转型是此次裁员的关键因素。【原文：Atlassian Corp. Chief Executive Officer Mike Cannon-Brookes announced plans to cut about 1,600 workers, saying the shift to artificial intelligence was a key factor behind the move.】

item.title: 油价延续涨势，因伊朗强硬言论盖过增产计划
item.description: 油价连续第二个交易日上涨，此前市场再度经历剧烈波动。随着伊朗战争的言论不断升级，市场对冲突长期化的担忧加剧，这抵消了富裕国家紧急释放原油储备的影响。【原文：Oil advanced a second day following another volatile session as escalating rhetoric over the Iran war raised concerns over a prolonged conflict, outweighing an emergency release of crude reserves by wealthy nations.】

item.title: 中国加大对国有企业的挤压力度以缓解财政压力
item.description: 中国正不断从国有企业收回利润以填补政府部分支出缺口，在财政收入出现近乎史无前例的下滑之年，对国企的榨取力度已达到空前水平。【原文：China is increasingly clawing back profits from state companies to cover some of the government’s spending needs, drawing on them more than ever during a year that saw an almost unprecedented decline in budget revenue.】

item.title: OpenClaw——人工智能奇迹还是网络安全噩梦？
item.description: 自奥地利程序员彼得·斯坦伯格于去年11月推出OpenClaw人工智能助手以来，用户蜂拥而至。这款数字助理能利用你的计算机处理以往仅人类可完成的复杂任务，例如预订行程、优先处理邮件并起草回复、浏览产品目录以及联系供应商。【原文：People have flocked to the OpenClaw artificial intelligence agent since it was launched in November by Austrian programmer Peter Steinberger. The digital assistant can use your computer to handle complex tasks that previously only a human could undertake, such as making travel bookings, prioritizing emails and drafting replies, surveying product catalogs and emailing vendors.】

item.title: 赛尔德公司70亿美元收购债务或将于下周启动
item.description: 银行正筹备约71.5亿美元的债务发行，以帮助克莱顿·杜比里尔·莱斯公司收购包装企业赛尔德公司。【原文：Banks are preparing a roughly $7.15 billion debt offering to help finance Clayton Dubilier & Rice’s buyout of packaging company Sealed Air Corp.】

item.title: Bumble全新AI助手助力约会突破滑动限制
item.description: Bumble公司推出一款由人工智能驱动的全新助手，旨在充当个人婚恋顾问。在众多用户对约会应用产生倦怠之际，这是该公司为重振业务所做的最新尝试。【原文：Bumble Inc. unveiled a new artificial intelligence-powered assistant designed to act as a personal matchmaker, the company’s latest effort to reinvigorate itself at a time when many users have shown dating-app fatigue.】

item.title: SpaceX与OpenAI潜在的重磅IPO吸引投资者陷入模糊交易
item.description:
投资者正通过特殊目的收购公司（SPAC）抢购热门企业上市前的股权。有时这些基金实际上并未持有任何股份。

【原文：

Buyers are joining special purpose vehicles to get a piece of the hottest companies before they go public. Sometimes the funds don’t actually own any shares.

】

item.title: 日本央行观察人士将目光投向4月加息，因下周将维持利率不变
item.description: 调查显示，超过三分之一的经济学家认为，日本央行下周将维持政策设置不变，但很可能在4月份上调基准利率。【原文：After holding policy settings steady next week, the Bank of Japan will likely raise its benchmark interest rate in April, according to more than a third of surveyed economists.】

item.title: 澳元强势上涨，澳大利亚养老基金增持外汇对冲头寸
item.description: 澳大利亚养老基金加大货币对冲力度，以缓冲其全球股票投资组合的风险，此前澳元汇率创下五年来的最大年度涨幅。【原文：Australia’s pension funds boosted currency hedges to cushion their global stock portfolios amid the local dollar’s biggest annual surge in five years.】

item.title: 顶级经纪商竞相为华尔街提供事件投注通道
item.description: 经纪商正向对冲基金及其他机构投资者开放Kalshi公司的事件投注服务，此举标志着新兴预测市场行业正加速向华尔街玩家敞开大门。【原文：Brokers to hedge funds and other institutional investors are moving to give clients access to Kalshi Inc.’s event bets, a sign of the growing push to open the nascent prediction market industry to Wall Street players.】

item.title: Petco盈利前景超预期 盈利能力实现逆转
item.description: Petco健康与保健公司公布的年度盈利预期高于分析师预测，表明尽管存在关税和经济不确定性，消费者在宠物方面的支出依然坚挺。该股在盘后交易中一度飙升20%。【原文：Petco Health & Wellness Co. forecast annual earnings above analyst estimates, signaling that consumer pet spending remains durable despite tariff and economic uncertainty. The shares surged as much as 20% in postmarket trading.】

item.title: 欧盟警告称伊朗冲突可能使该集团通胀率超过3%
item.description: 欧盟警告称，若中东战争导致布伦特原油价格持续维持在每桶100美元左右，且天然气价格长期居高不下，今年欧盟通胀率可能突破3%。【原文：The European Union warned that its inflation rate could surpass 3% this year if the war in the Middle East causes Brent oil prices to remain around $100 per barrel and gas prices stay elevated for an extended period.】

item.title: 苹果可折叠iPhone展开后将采用类似iPad的界面
item.description: 苹果公司即将推出的可折叠iPhone将搭载更新版iOS操作系统，首次支持类似iPad的分屏布局和并排应用程序，从而增强设备的多任务处理吸引力。【原文：Apple Inc.’s forthcoming foldable iPhone will include updates to the iOS operating system that enable iPad-like layouts and side-by-side apps for the first time, enhancing the device’s appeal for multitasking.】

item.title: 仙纳都数据中心获2.87亿美元融资，特殊目的收购公司交易临近
item.description: 仙纳都量子技术公司即将获得高达3.9亿加元（约合2.87亿美元）的政府财政援助，用于在安大略省建设其首个量子驱动数据中心的工程设计与本土制造能力。该协议正值该公司即将上市之际展开谈判。【原文：Xanadu Quantum Technologies Inc. is set to receive as much as C$390 million ($287 million) in government financial aid to build the engineering and domestic manufacturing capabilities for its first quantum-powered data center in Ontario, a deal that’s being negotiated just as the company is about to go public.】

item.title: 奈飞将斥资6亿美元收购本·阿弗莱克的人工智能公司
item.description: 据知情人士透露，流媒体巨头奈飞公司将斥资高达6亿美元收购由本·阿弗莱克创立的人工智能电影制作公司InterPositive，此次收购将成为该公司史上最大规模的并购之一。【原文：Netflix Inc. will pay as much as $600 million for InterPositive, the AI moviemaking company founded by Ben Affleck, according to people familiar with the matter, making the purchase one of the biggest ever by the streaming leader.】

item.title: 穆迪将纽约市信用展望下调至负面
item.description: 穆迪评级机构将纽约市的展望下调至负面，理由是预计该市将出现"规模可观且持续存在"的预算缺口。【原文：Moody’s Ratings lowered its outlook on New York City to negative, citing “sizable and persistent” expected budget gaps.】

item.title: 哥伦比亚赤字规模缩小，2026年计划中未提及债券发售
item.description: 哥伦比亚财政部预测，由于支出和债务偿还成本降低，今年财政赤字规模将缩小。【原文：Colombia’s finance ministry forecast a smaller fiscal deficit this year due to lower spending and debt service costs.】

item.title: 私募信贷公司Ares召开全体员工大会，安抚员工对市场波动的担忧
item.description: 据首席执行官迈克·阿鲁盖蒂透露，阿瑞斯管理公司本周召开全体员工大会，旨在安抚对近期市场波动感到担忧的员工，并强调这种波动所创造的投资机遇。【原文：Ares Management Corp. convened a town hall this week to reassure employees concerned about recent market volatility and emphasize the investment opportunities it created, according to Chief Executive Officer Mike Arougheti.】

item.title: 玻利维亚承诺履行债务偿还义务，债务置换谈判取得进展
item.description: 玻利维亚财政部长何塞·加布里埃尔·埃斯皮诺萨表示，该国承诺本月向私人债券持有人支付美元债券款项，同时计划将国内公共机构持有的债券转换为本币债务。【原文：Bolivia pledged to meet dollar bond payments this month to private bondholders, as it looks to swap notes held by local public institutions into local currency debt, said Finance Minister Jose Gabriel Espinoza.】

item.title: 特朗普要求最高法院允许驱逐海地人
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普要求美国最高法院允许其政府废除一项法律保护措施，该措施保护35万海地人免遭驱逐出境。【原文：President Donald Trump asked the US Supreme Court to let his administration scrap a legal shield that protects 350,000 Haitians from deportation.】

item.title: 亚特兰大律所因在新泽西州法院选择性诉讼的操作招致债权人愤怒
item.description: 总部位于亚特兰大的多色公司（Multi-Color Corp.）近日采取了一项耐人寻味的举措：在距其总部约900英里的新泽西州ConnectOne银行开设了小型商业账户。尽管这家标签制造巨头在北美拥有近40家工厂，但其所有设施均未设在新泽西州。【原文：Atlanta-based Multi-Color Corp. made a curious move: It opened tiny business accounts at New Jersey’s ConnectOne Bank, some 900 miles from its headquarters. Although the label-making giant has nearly 40 North American facilities, none are located in the Garden State.】

item.title: Cliffwater 330亿美元私募信贷基金赎回率达14%
item.description: 据彭博社获得的一封致投资者信函显示，Cliffwater LLC旗舰私募信贷基金的投资者在第一季度寻求赎回约14%的份额，导致该公司将其回购上限设定为7%。【原文：Investors in Cliffwater LLC’s flagship private credit fund looked to redeem about 14% of shares in the first quarter, leading the firm to cap its repurchases at 7%, it said in a letter to investors seen by Bloomberg.】

item.title: 关税税率下调后 美国预算赤字收窄速度放缓
item.description: 2月份预算赤字收窄幅度较上月放缓，因美国关税收入从去年末达到的峰值开始回落。【原文：The budget deficit narrowed in February at a slower pace than the previous month as US tariff revenue started to slow from the peak rate hit late last year.】
